description_long: This object is a compact, futuristic shotgun with a robust metallic body and a dark wooden pistol grip. The main barrel is short and thick, with a matte steel finish and reinforced by metal bands and visible bolts. Two red cylindrical components are mounted beneath the barrel, possibly serving as shell holders or part of a unique loading mechanism. The receiver features a prominent sight and a stylized metallic emblem on the side, adding to its industrial aesthetic. The trigger area is protected by a rounded metal guard, and the grip is ergonomically shaped with a polished wood texture. The overall design suggests a weapon built for close-quarters use, blending modern and classic elements.
description: A compact, metallic shotgun with a short barrel, red cylindrical attachments, and a dark wooden pistol grip. Its design is robust and industrial, featuring a prominent sight and a rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, the wooden grip, metallic body, red cylindrical attachments, and a stylized emblem on the receiver.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the twin barrel openings, red cylindrical components beneath, and the alignment of the sight above the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden grip, metallic body, and red cylindrical attachments, with less visible emblem detail.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the grip, the sight, and the twin barrel ends with red cylindrical components visible below.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel, short length, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized metal guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves
